published_prior_art.cite: AngristImbensRubin1996: principal-strata IV formulation gives the same observable compliance-type mass algebra under one-sided/no-always-taker restrictions
Noack2021: sharp LATE sensitivity bounds use defier-share plus outcome-distribution sensitivity; Huber2014: published LATE sensitivity checks for monotonicity violations
deChaisemartin2017 and DahlHuberMellace2023: point-identify alternative LATE objects under compliers-defiers or local monotonicity restrictions, but do not state this zero-threshold negative result
ImbensAngrist1994: exact Wald LATE corner; Manski1990: endpoint bounded-outcome collapse logic

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The observable principal-stratum mass decomposition is standard AIR/Imbens-Angrist principal-strata algebra, not a novel theorem.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The literature comparison misses Huber2014, Economics Letters, 'Sensitivity checks for the local average treatment effect', a directly relevant published monotonicity-sensitivity paper.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed sharp set ranges over models matching P(Y,D|Z=z,X) but the formula only uses the Z=0,D=0 mixture and omits the Z=1,D=0 observed cell, which constrains the never-taker/defier untreated mixture and can tighten the bound.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The zero-threshold claim fails in the eta=0, pi_N>0 corner: Z=1,D=0 identifies the never-taker untreated mean, so the Z=0,D=0 mixture identifies mu_C0 and theta_C even when 0<m00<1.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Redraft the kernel to include all four observed cells, especially m10(x)=E[Y|Z=1,D=0,X=x], and derive the intersection of the C/N and N/F mixture constraints before claiming sharpness.
Replace the zero-threshold conjecture with a threshold statement conditional on eta(x)>0 and nondegenerate N/F mixture slack, explicitly excluding the eta=0 exact-Wald corner with never-takers.
Add Huber2014 and Swanson-Hernan-Miller-Robins-Richardson2018 to the related-work comparison to separate LATE sensitivity from binary-IV ATE partial-identification reviews.

recommended_next_step: Reject this version and redraft around the full four-cell principal-strata mixture system before re-running novelty review.
